title: Sneaky!
description: A mod that fixes sneak in Minecraft!
body: # 💨 Sneaky! You know, sometimes, you need to stay sneaky even when you need to open your inventory or a chest. Minecraft just un-sneaks you when that happens. Well, I have fixed that! ## QoL Whenever you open your inventory or do anything that might un-sneak you, this mod prevents un-sneaking from happening! ## Sneak Toggle Time Since v1.3 you can set sneak toggle time! (for all the sneak toggle users <3) This allows you to hold the sneak button for that amount of time, after which the player will continue sneaking without you holding anything. To un-sneak - just press the sneak button again! ## ℹ️) Note To access the configuration screen, you need [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) and [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) installed!
